reviews.review_description: old one was a little bit off comparing to the videos that Facebook shares - but now it's in pair or even better. A true must have!
Stop in my s6

developer_response.body: Hi Marcelo, thanks for letting us know about this. Could you send an email to QA@felixandpaul.com about the issue, including your device's specifications (phone model, Android version and Oculus version)? Our team will be able to help you from there. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: The resolution here seems a lot clearer than even the actual downloaded videos, such as the jurassic world demo. The cirque de soleil clip is in 3d and is impressively clear! (don't know where it's from but would like to have the whole clip) Why can't they make all videos in 3d and in this clarity?  Even the basketball clip is amazingly clear and also in 3d.  This is the quality vr need.  Forget the low resolution "360" videos.

reviews.review_title: Not as good as the original
reviews.review_description: The original occurs rift demo these. Guys made was amazong it had thought and heart and me genuinely feel something.  This feels like the one they made beforehand that was nearly there but didn't quite cut it. Good job. The original was waaaaay better.
Great product and works very well

reviews.review_title: Always the 1st thing I show to people!
reviews.review_description:
Perfect introduction to VR.
It's short and gives the viewer a great understanding on the potentials of VR as an all round entertainment format, making use of full 360 degrees.

It's always been my go to app when showing someone VR for the first time. I consider this one better than the other paid VR introduction app (which I think takes too long and has uneeded cheesy 2nd half).

This is a 2:50 s video made of a series of clips from other VR videos. It can be an interesting introduction to VR for some, but there are certainly much better experiences available in the Oculus Gear VR store for the same purpose.
Great way to introduce others to vr. One problem, devs, none of your videos work with my bludio Bluetooth headphones. The audio comes in all messed up. Can you please fix this?
But it could use a better resolution

I was really disappointed with the first release of the VR introduction. Let's not forget that this is supposed to be the killer trailer that summarises how awesome VR can be. The first one didnt really cut it but this is far superior and i'm almost really pleased with it. Im still convinced they could have used better quality footage especially on the initial space scene as the compression / pixellation is still quite bad. The fire swinger / circus scene especially really look cool! Either way i think it is a pretty good demo to show your friends so go for it! :-)
U

One of my best experiences even though it wasn't a game.
1st app I downloaded...what a great first experience!
Very cool plethora of content showing off lots of 3d video content.
Wonderful video as an introduction to vr 360 videos ... I showed it to everyone who need to take an idea about vr

It seems to be a 1 1/2 minute narrative of what you could see in the app but that's  all I see. How long is it supposed to be I only get snippets of what's in the app don't see anything else.

Great device...recommended for everyone
